business.geography_hint: Tuscany, Italy (Prato, Montemurlo, Pistoia, Empoli, Versilia)

engine.ladder_reasoning: A gym is a PLACE you check out — 5 physical locations with addresses, phone, hours and maps, 80+ browsable classes, and location filters are the decision surface; browsing where/what/hours IS the choice, not evaluating a product or trusting a named expert.

goal.one_action: get the visitor to contact/visit a gym location — request a PT consultation, grab a coupon, or come in to sign up for a membership

structure.archetype_note: Sprawling multi-page WordPress/Elementor gym-chain site: locations, activities catalog, membership pricing, services, careers, blog, merch shop with cart, and events — many jobs, not one conversion action.

mapped.observed_as: Scegli il tuo abbonamento mensile (9 membership tiers)
Parla con un Personal Trainer / Lavora con noi
SCEGLI ADESSO IL TUO FIDELITY CLUB!

unmapped.observed: Tutte le Sedi (5 location cards, each with address/phone/hours/embedded map)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical id for a multi-location map/hours directory; closest is a repeated map-hours block
No canonical section for an e-commerce storefront within a lead/place page

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: Branded merchandise Shop with a cart showing €0.00 — an on-site cart selling one-time goods, distinct from the membership pricing table (which is in-club signup).

confidence.why: fetch_quality is partial (Fidelity Club page 403'd, /attivita 404'd, requiring URL discovery; 80+ classes summarized not enumerated); design colors/fonts empty so style is inferred from gym/photo-heavy context.

gap_findings: in_icp:false — this is a multi-purpose gym-chain site (5 locations + membership pricing + merch shop w/ cart + blog + events + careers), not a single conversion action; taxonomy's single-CTA framing cannot express it.

Membership pricing (9 tiers) is display-only with signup completed in-club — sits between 'packages' (static display) and 'membership-checkout' (on-site recurring transaction); neither cleanly fits an off-site/in-person plan signup.
Multi-location map-hours directory (repeated per branch with own phone/email/hours) has no dedicated canonical section id.
